query: UPDATE categories SET code = CONCAT('ca', LPAD(CASE id WHEN 30001 THEN 18 WHEN 30002 THEN 19 ELSE id END, 3, '0')) WHERE code IS NULL;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway06.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 4LUtXE4vPqQU3CD.root --database WG3U3sVg2ZrW6m8T99FRdE --execute UPDATE categories SET code = CONCAT('ca', LPAD(CASE id WHEN 30001 THEN 18 WHEN 30002 THEN 19 ELSE id END, 3, '0')) WHERE code IS NULL;
